problem id: f5cb333a
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(7) AND SHR(3)

examples:
  11111101 -> 00011110
  11000001 -> 00000000
  01111101 -> 00001110
  11000101 -> 00000000
  11000010 -> 00000000
  11110111 -> 00011010
  00001100 -> 00000000
  00000101 -> 00000000

query: 10010010
predicted answer: 00000000
